TITLE Greek Yogurt Marinated Chicken


{[Marinade]
# In a large bowl whisk together [1 cup greek yogurt], [3 tbl olive oil], [2 tbl lemon juice], [3 cloves garlic[, minced]], [1 tsp [dried] oregano], [1 tsp cumin], [1 tsp smoked paprika], [1/2 tsp salt], and [1/2 tsp pepper].
}

# Portion [1 lbs chicken breast] and coat with $[Marinade]s.
# Refrigerate at least 1 hour, preferably 4 hours or overnight.
# Grill
# Serve garnished with lemon wedges].
